notes: Probe-validated: 334 speeches, 2021-10-11..2026-07-04, bodies 1.4k-14k chars. country=Estonia; source_url=https://president.ee/et/ametitegevus/koned/; region=Europe; iso3n=233; source_type=official_gov; content_format=fulltext | Nuxt SPA -> renderer=js MANDATORY (static HTML carries 1 speech link; JS-rendered listing carries 20/page). Pager has no hrefs and the URL never changes -> pagination=click with next_selector 'li.page-item.next:not(.disabled) a.page-link'; the :not(.disabled) is load-bearing (the site hides the pager on the last page, which otherwise trips the #53 'stopped EARLY' warning on a COMPLETE 17-page harvest). date_languages MUST stay ['et'] alone: '01.07.2026' -> 2026-07-01 with ['et'] but 2026-01-07 with ['en'] AND with ['et','en']. Floor is Karis's inauguration speech, so the live site holds ONE president -> Kaljulaid (2016-21) needs a wayback companion (untested). Estonia's president is ceremonial (is_ceremonial=TRUE in the tenure key); the PM is the head of government and has no master row.
